commands.name: build
commands.description: Compile a Meadow application

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the Meadow project file

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets app.config.yaml setting values

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the connected device's app.config.yaml settings

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Debug a running Meadow application

options.name: --Port
options.description: The port to run the debug server on Default: "4024".

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploys a previously compiled Meadow application to a target device

commands.name: run
commands.description: Build, trim and deploy a Meadow application to a target device

options.name: --prefix
options.description: When set, the message source prefix (e.g. 'stdout>') is shown during 'listen' Default: "False".

commands.name: trim
commands.description: Trim a pre-compiled Meadow application

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the Meadow project file

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a Meadow.Cloud API key

options.name: --duration
options.description: The duration of the API key, in days

options.name: --scopes
options.description: The list of scopes (permissions) to grant the API key

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

arguments.name: NAME
arguments.description: The name of the API key

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a Meadow.Cloud API key

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

arguments.name: NAME_OR_ID
arguments.description: The name or ID of the API key

commands.name: list
commands.description: List your Meadow.Cloud API keys

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update a Meadow.Cloud API key

options.name: --name
options.description: The new name to use for the API key

options.name: --scopes
options.description: The list of scopes (permissions) to grant the API key

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

arguments.name: NAME_OR_ID
arguments.description: The name or ID of the API key

commands.name: list
commands.description: List Meadow Collections

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish a command to Meadow devices via Meadow.Cloud

options.name: --collectionId
options.description: The target collection for publishing the command

options.name: --deviceIds
options.description: The target devices for publishing the command

options.name: --args
options.description: The arguments for the command as a JSON string

options.name: --qos
options.description: The MQTT-defined quality of service for the command Choices: "AtLeastOnce", "AtMostOnce", "ExactlyOnce". Default: "AtLeastOnce".

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a Meadow Package (MPAK)

options.name: --configuration
options.description: The build configuration to compile Default: "Release".

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the mpak file to be created

options.name: --filter
options.description: Glob pattern to filter files. ex ('app.dll', 'app*','{app.dll,meadow.dll}') Default: "**/*".

options.name: --osVersion
options.description: Target OS version for the app

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all Meadow Packages (MPAK)

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publishes a Meadow Package (MPAK)

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

arguments.name: PackageID
arguments.description: ID of the package to publish

commands.name: upload
commands.description: Upload a Meadow Package (MPAK) to Meadow.Cloud

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

arguments.name: MpakPath
arguments.description: The full path of the mpak file

commands.name: config
commands.description: Read or modify the meadow CLI configuration

commands.name: route
commands.description: Sets the communication route for HCOM

commands.name: source
commands.description: Sets the root folder for Meadow source directories

commands.name: developer
commands.description: Sets a specified developer parameter on the Meadow

options.name: --value
options.description: The value to apply to the parameter. Valid values are 0 to 4,294,967,295. Default: "0".

options.name: --timeout
options.description: The Test timeout value. Default is 60 seconds. Default: "60".

commands.name: clock
commands.description: Gets or sets the device clock (in UTC time). Use either 'now' or a date/time inside single quotes

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets meadow.config.yaml setting values

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the connected device's meadow.config.yaml settings

commands.name: wifi
commands.description: Configure the connected device's wifi settings

commands.name: info
commands.description: Get the device info

options.name: --public-key
options.description: Include the target device's public key in the output Default: "False".

commands.name: provision
commands.description: Registers and prepares connected device for use with Meadow Cloud

options.name: --orgId
options.description: The target org for device registration

options.name: --collectionId
options.description: The target collection for device registration

options.name: --host
options.description: Optionally set a host (default is https://www.meadowcloud.co)

options.name: --public-key
options.description: The public key of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device.

options.name: --id
options.description: The unique ID/serial number of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device.

options.name: --gen-command
options.description: Generate a provisioning command for the configured device Default: "False".

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the device

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install dfu-util to the host operating system

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Deletes a file from the device

commands.name: delete-all
commands.description: Deletes all files from the device

commands.name: initial
commands.description: Display the initial bytes from a device file

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the files in the current device directory

commands.name: read
commands.description: Reads a file from the device and writes it to the local file system

commands.name: write
commands.description: Writes one or more files to the device from the local file system

options.name: --files
options.description: The file(s) to write to the Meadow Files System

options.name: --targetFiles
options.description: The filename(s) to use on the Meadow File System Default: .

commands.name: default
commands.description: Sets the current default firmware package

arguments.name: version
arguments.description: Version number to use as default

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a local firmware package

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download a firmware package

options.name: --apikey
options.description: The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List locally available firmware

commands.name: write
commands.description: Writes firmware files to a connected meadow device

options.name: --use-dfu
options.description: Force using DFU/HCOM for writing files Default: "True".

commands.name: erase
commands.description: Erase the contents of the device flash storage

commands.name: listen
commands.description: Listen for console output from Meadow

options.name: --prefix
options.description: When set, the message source prefix (e.g. 'stdout>') is shown Default: "False".

options.name: --log
options.description: A file name to store output to

options.name: --timestamps
options.description: When set, the message will be prefixed with a UTC timestamp Default: "False".

commands.name: login
commands.description: Log in to your Wilderness Labs account

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Log out of your Wilderness Labs account

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available local serial ports

commands.name: select
commands.description: Select a port from a list of available local serial ports

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install or updates to the latest project templates

commands.name: new
commands.description: Shows a list of project templates to choose from.

options.name: -o
options.description: The path where you would like the projects created.

options.name: -l
options.description: Generate the projects using the specified language. Valid values are C# or F# or VB.NET Default: "C#".

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Sets the runtime to NOT run on the Meadow board then resets it

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Sets the runtime to run on the Meadow board then resets it

commands.name: state
commands.description: Gets the device's current runtime state

commands.name: checkout
commands.description: Pulls a single-named branch of all Meadow source repositories

arguments.name: branch
arguments.description: Path to the Meadow project file

commands.name: clone
commands.description: Clones any missing local Meadow source repositories

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Fetches each of the local Meadow source repositories

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pulls each of the local Meadow source repositories

commands.name: status
commands.description: Compares the local Meadow source repositories with the remotes

commands.name: telemetry
commands.description: Manage participation in telemetry sharing

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disable and opt out of telemetry sharing

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enable and opt in to telemetry sharing

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disable trace logging on the Meadow

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enable trace logging on the Meadow

commands.name: level
commands.description: Sets the trace logging level on the Meadow

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables profiling data output to UART

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables profiling data output to UART

options.name: --interface
options.description: Set the serial interface to read the profiling data via COM1

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description: Set the profiling data output directory path

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables trace log output to UART

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables trace log output to UART
